# /root
./commands ./invite ./help
bash — Commands — 80x24
man -k droot-bot

Manual pages for droot-bot binaries (48 entries)

grep
./actions:
-rwxr-xr-x root /emotion # trigger specialized emotional visual responses (anime gifs) to express your current mood in the channel.
-rwxr-xr-x root /reactions # interactive anime-style reactions to respond to other users' messages with visual flair.
./admin:
-rwxr-xr-x root /ban # permanently restrict a user's access to the server. kernel-level security measure.
-rwxr-xr-x root /clear # purge a specified number of recent messages from the current terminal buffer (channel).
-rwxr-xr-x root /kick # eject a user from the server while allowing them the possibility of return.
-rwxr-xr-x root /settings # modify core configuration parameters for the /root instance on this server.
-rwxr-xr-x root /timeout # temporarily isolate a user, preventing them from sending messages for a specified duration.
-rwxr-xr-x root /unban # revoke a permanent ban, allowing a previously restricted user to return.
-rwxr-xr-x root /warn # issue a formal system warning to a user for protocol violations.
./economy:
-rwxr-xr-x root /cookiegiver # transfer currency units (cookies) to another user in the economy subsystem.
-rwxr-xr-x root /cookies # query the central database for your current cookie balance or view the high-score givers.
-rwxr-xr-x root /nom # consume a currency unit to restore sanity. highly addictive economy interaction.
./games:
-rwxr-xr-x root /8ball # consult the magic 8-ball quantum processor for high-probability answers to any question.
-rwxr-xr-x root /choose # execute a randomization algorithm to pick from a set of user-provided options.
-rwxr-xr-x root /flip # simulate a binary state transition using a virtual coin flip.
-rwxr-xr-x root /poll # deploy an interactive data collection module to gather community feedback.
-rwxr-xr-x root /roll # generate pseudorandom numbers based on standard dice notation (e.g. 1d20).
./general:
-rwxr-xr-x root /suggest # open a direct communication uplink to the /root developers for feedback and bugs.
./owner:
-rwxr-xr-x root /reload # refresh all command modules and hot-swap code without rebooting the bot. (owner only)
-rwxr-xr-x root /say # execute a text-to-speech simulation where the bot echoes your input. (owner only)
-rwxr-xr-x root /ticket # deploy the centralized support ticket panel for user assistance. (owner only)
-rwxr-xr-x root /whitelist # manage the authorized access list for high-tier /root functionality. (owner only)
./search:
-rwxr-xr-x root /cat # query external databases for random feline visual data packets.
-rwxr-xr-x root /define # access the linguistics database to retrieve formal definitions for any term.
-rwxr-xr-x root /duckduckgo # execute a privacy-centric web search via the DuckDuckGo API.
-rwxr-xr-x root /gif # search extensive media repositories for animated graphics based on your query.
-rwxr-xr-x root /image # execute complex generative algorithms or query existing image databases for visual assets.
-rwxr-xr-x root /lyrics # locate and display the lyrical transcription for musical tracks.
-rwxr-xr-x root /urban # query the informal linguistic database (Urban Dictionary) for contemporary slang.
-rwxr-xr-x root /weather # retrieve real-time meteorological data for any specified coordinates or city.
-rwxr-xr-x root /wikipedia # query the global knowledge repository for detailed encyclopedic information.
./tools:
-rwxr-xr-x root /avatar # retrieve and display the visual identification asset (avatar) of a user.
-rwxr-xr-x root /birthday # manage and track user birth-anniversary data within the server subsystem.
-rwxr-xr-x root /colour # analyze hex color codes and provide detailed chromatic information.
-rwxr-xr-x root /echo # repeat any user-provided string back into the channel buffer.
-rwxr-xr-x root /help # display the core documentation and manual pages for all /root commands.
-rwxr-xr-x root /http # query documentation for standardized network response status codes.
-rwxr-xr-x root /info # display detailed system specification and metadata about the /root bot.
-rwxr-xr-x root /math # execute arithmetic operations and evaluate complex mathematical expressions.
-rwxr-xr-x root /password # generate high-entropy, cryptographically secure random character strings.
-rwxr-xr-x root /ping # measure the network round-trip latency between the bot and Discord's servers.
-rwxr-xr-x root /qr # encode text or URLs into 2D matrix barcodes (QR codes) for scanning.
-rwxr-xr-x root /reminder # schedule future notification callbacks to be sent to your terminal.
-rwxr-xr-x root /serverinfo # display metadata and statistics about the current server instance.
-rwxr-xr-x root /shorten # compress long network URIs into compact, redirected short-links.
-rwxr-xr-x root /timezone # manage localized temporal data and synchronize your time with the community.
-rwxr-xr-x root /translate # execute cross-lingual translation modules for any given text segment.
-rwxr-xr-x root /userinfo # query the centralized user registry for detailed metadata about a specific individual.
github.lnk | website.lnk

[SYSTEM] /root v1.0.0-linux | Bot by snowwysillycat
